title: Improve Empty View Name Validation Alert Message
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a clear validation message when I try to save without entering a view name, so that I understand what action is needed.
description: Replaces the generic validation alert shown when a user attempts to save an empty view name with a more descriptive message: 'Please enter a view name before saving.' The save button should also be disabled until the user starts typing to prevent premature submissions.
acceptance_criteria: Attempting to save with an empty view name shows 'Please enter a view name before saving'
Save button is disabled until the user begins entering a view name
ux_changes: Validation alert text updated to 'Please enter a view name before saving.' Save button disabled until input begins.
comment_summary: Developer added the message and proposed disabling save until typing begins, matching the metric name pattern.
